name: Fast and Creamy Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the frozen mixed vegetables according to the package directions, then drain and reserve.
2. In a large saucepan, heat milk and water until boiling. Add instant minced onion, chicken bouillon granules, salt, and celery. Stir to combine.
3. Remove the saucepan from heat. Stir in the instant mashed potatoes.
4. Return the saucepan to heat and continue stirring constantly until boiling.
